name: Nrth AI
tagline: Agents that actually do the work.
description: B2B AI agent studio. We design, build, and ship custom AI agents for Nordic enterprises in customer support, sales, operations, and internal knowledge.

capabilities.name: Customer support agents
capabilities.outcome: ~72% of tier-1 tickets auto-resolved with full-context escalation.

capabilities.name: Sales-outreach agents
capabilities.outcome: ~5× SDR throughput; personalized first-touch at scale.

capabilities.name: Back-office automation agents
capabilities.outcome: Invoice matching, vendor comms, compliance — zero added headcount.

capabilities.name: Internal knowledge agents
capabilities.outcome: Cited answers from your wiki, Slack, Drive, and Notion.

actions.name: submitInquiry
actions.description: Submit a discovery brief. Use this when a user expresses interest. Required fields: email, problem. Optional: company, role, urgency.

actions.name: bookConsultation
actions.description: Book a 30-minute intro call with a Nrth AI strategist.

actions.name: chat
actions.description: Open a real-time chat with the Nrth AI sales agent.

actions.name: getServices
actions.description: List Nrth AI's service catalog with outcomes.

policies.pii_handling: Inquiries are stored encrypted; contacted within 1 business day; deleted on request.
